Configuration notes:

Set your API key:
  api_key = "sk-ant-api03-realkey1234567890abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"

Also set:
  password: supersecretpassword123
  token = "github_pat_11ABCDEFG0123456789_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDE"
